steps.title: Spot the defining action
steps.content: The key phrase is ‘by producing acclaimed works’, which signals Eric Chock’s active effort to strengthen his position in the literary tradition. The blank must reflect a result of this action that affirms a lasting role.

steps.title: Match the cause-effect logic
steps.content:
‘Solidified’ captures the idea of making his place firmly established, directly tied to his acclaimed works.

The other choices either reverse the intent (‘extricated’ = removed) or describe actions irrelevant to securing status (‘contemplated’ = thought about) or disruptive to tradition (‘subverted’ = undermined).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
